_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: tumor-associated macrophages (TAM) by CD163 surface marker. There were statistically significant increases of both infiltrating dendritic cells (p<0.0001) and TAM (p<0.0001) in benign to malignant PNST
details: Successfully detected tumor-associated macrophages with statistically significant increases from benign to malignant PNST (p<0.0001); median density of 422.3 cells/mm² in malignant tumors; higher CD8+/CD163+ ratio associated with better overall survival
